**Analyzing Invalid Classes**

Okay, I've identified some invalid fraction classes within the Tailwind CSS implementation. Specifically, `py-2.2` on line 3672 (candidate card) and `p-2.2` on line 3687 (also candidate card), both of which have been corrected to `py-2.5`. I am continuing to investigate the code base for other classes to fix.
